---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a reusable improvement to the framework
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What limitation are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Direction

Describe the change you want.

## Why It Belongs In The Public Framework

Explain why this is reusable and not specific to one person's private setup.

## Privacy Check

Confirm that the request does not depend on exposing personal memory, session data, or secrets.
